caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a patterned bowtie, glasses, and a large, stylized grey wig. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with framed photographs and clothing displays, including garments from "LEE". On-screen, a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears in red and white. As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, with subtle changes in his facial expression and mouth movements across the frames, while the camera angle and the surrounding environment remain stationary.
